objective: Review the implementation of CART-S02-T02: add a read-only carto stats CLI command that loads the graph, calls graphStats(), and prints pluralised node/edge counts.
key_changes: All acceptance criteria verified against actual diff: stats command registered, graphStats imported, action handler correct
Pluralisation logic correct: two independent ternaries for node/edge singular/plural
Command is purely read-only: no save() call, no flags, no arguments
graph.ts unchanged by T02 — graphStats was introduced by T01
Security surface negligible: no user input, no filesystem writes, no network paths
routing.md updated with stats command documentation in three sections
All verification commands pass independently: 21 tests, clean build, clean lint
